hero.headline:
Make your hotel 
 impossible to ignore.
hero.subheader: HotelMinds verbindet Strategie und Umsetzung für den entscheidenden Vorsprung für Premium-Hotels

process.title: Audit & Diagnosis
process.text: Comprehensive analysis of pricing, distribution mix, ranking performance and competitive positioning

process.title: Strategic Roadmap
process.text: Clear 6–9 month action plan covering ranking improvement, pricing architecture, channel alignment, and direct strategy

process.title: Implementation & Monitoring
process.text: Execution, tracking, and continuous refinement to ensure measurable performance improvement

results.title: Before Working With Us
results.subTitle: Reactive Market Position
results.introText: Many hotels currently operate in a reactive state, struggling with inconsistent market visibility and a heavy reliance on price-driven competition.

results.title: The Key Strategic Changes
results.subTitle: Performance Optimization
results.introText: By addressing these gaps, we implement a series of strategic optimizations designed to regain control over your distribution and maximize your visibility
bullets: Improve search visibility across major platforms
Enhance revenue control and reduce margin pressure

results.title: After Working With Us
results.subTitle: Long-term Growth & Independence
results.introText: Our partnership results in a resilient digital presence where increased visibility translates directly into higher margins and a clearer competitive edge.
